checks.name: score/band/posture artifact-derived
checks.evidence: 60, CONDITIONAL, INVESTIGATE confirmed in DS HTML. Sourced from gauge_state.json composite_score, band_label, decision_model.

checks.name: no 'all domains grounded'
checks.evidence: grep -ic 'all domains.*grounded|All domains are structurally grounded' → 0 matches.

checks.name: no '13 domains' terminology misuse
checks.evidence: grep -c '13 domains' → 0 matches. Term present: '13 of 13 structural evidence groups are grounded' (correct).

checks.name: semantic coverage displayed
checks.evidence: DS confirmed section: '5 of 17 semantic domains have structural backing; 12 remain semantic-only.' Verified via grep.

checks.name: active zone displayed with semantic label
checks.evidence: Confirmed section: 'centered on Platform Infrastructure and Data'. Pressure block title: 'PZ-001 — Platform Infrastructure and Data'. Primary label is semantic domain name.

checks.name: DOM backing displayed as trace only
checks.evidence: DOM-04 appears as 'backed by DOM-04 / backend_app_root' (confirmed section) and 'DOM backing: DOM-04 / Platform Infrastructure and Data' (synthesis block). Not used as primary label.

checks.name: active signals = PSIG-001/002/004
checks.evidence: DS signals list: 'PSIG-001 · PSIG-002 · PSIG-004' (3 occurrences each for signal chips). Sourced from active_conditions_in_scope filtered by RUN_RELATIVE_OUTLIER.

checks.name: PSIG-006 baseline not active pressure signal
checks.evidence: DS: 'Baseline signal: PSIG-006 — theoretical baseline condition, not an activated pressure signal.' PSIG-006 not in active signals list, not in zone signals.

checks.name: unsupported metrics not classified
checks.evidence: dep_load = NOT_IN_SCOPE. The 'Dependency and structural density' sentence is NOT emitted (conditional check: dep_load not in NOT_IN_SCOPE). grep -c 'dep_load|density remain|dependency.*low|dependency.*high' → 0 matches.

checks.name: runtime boundary visible
checks.evidence: Hero rationale: 'Execution evidence is incomplete.' Gap items: 'Execution-layer behavioral state'. Inference prohibition ACTIVE banner present.

checks.name: no recommendations/remediation
checks.evidence: The word 'remediation' appears once in: 'No advisory content, causal inference, or remediation guidance may be derived.' — this IS the prohibition statement, not a recommendation. grep -ic 'recommend|action item|commit to|do not commit' → 0.

checks.name: no PZ-002/PZ-003 unless artifact-backed
checks.evidence: grep -c 'PZ-002|PZ-003' → 0. Only PZ-001 present (artifact has 1 zone).

checks.name: no backend_app_root as primary label
checks.evidence: backend_app_root appears once: 'backed by DOM-04 / backend_app_root' — as structural backing, not primary label. Primary label is always semantic domain name.

checks.name: client-agnostic — no hardcoded client values
checks.evidence: Client name 'BlueEdge Fleet Management Platform' rendered via _get_client_display_name() from _CLIENT_DISPLAY_NAMES dict. 'blueedge' in navigation URLs comes from _ACTIVE_CLIENT runtime config. No client literals in new rendering logic.
